Container.Name: BitBonsai
Container.Overview:
BitBonsai - Intelligent Video Encoding Platform
Automatically optimize your media library with smart encoding policies: • Hardware acceleration (NVIDIA NVENC, Intel QSV, AMD AMF) • Distributed encoding across multiple nodes • Smart codec detection and conversion (H.264 → H.265/AV1) • Resume capability for interrupted jobs • Real-time progress tracking • Auto-healing for failed jobs • SSD cache pool support for faster encoding
Perfect for Plex/Jellyfin libraries - reduce storage by 40-60% while maintaining quality!

Config.Name: API Port
Config.Description: Backend API port (required for frontend communication)

Config.Name: Media Library
Config.Description: Your media library (movies, TV shows) - BitBonsai will scan and encode videos here

Config.Name: Downloads Folder
Config.Description: Downloads folder - BitBonsai can auto-process new downloads from Sonarr/Radarr

Config.Name: Encoding Cache (SSD)
Config.Description: Temporary encoding workspace - STRONGLY RECOMMENDED to use cache drive (SSD) for 10-100x faster encoding performance

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for file permissions (99 = nobody on Unraid)

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for file permissions (100 = users on Unraid)

Config.Name: Max Concurrent Jobs
Config.Description: Maximum number of encoding jobs to run simultaneously (adjust based on your CPU/GPU capacity)

Config.Name: NVIDIA GPU (NVENC)
Config.Description: Enable NVIDIA GPU passthrough for NVENC hardware encoding. Set to 'all' to use all GPUs, or specify GPU UUID. Requires '--runtime=nvidia' in Extra Parameters. Leave empty to disable.

Config.Name: Intel QuickSync (QSV)
Config.Description: Enable Intel QuickSync by passing /dev/dri device. Set to '/dev/dri' to enable. Leave empty to disable.

Config.Name: AMD GPU (AMF)
Config.Description: Enable AMD GPU by passing render device. Set to '/dev/dri/renderD128' to enable. Leave empty to disable.

Config.Name: Extra Parameters
Config.Description: Additional Docker parameters. For NVIDIA GPU add: --runtime=nvidia --gpus all
